user_query: I've been stuck in meetings most of the week. Which days have nature activities where I can actually get outside?

selected_nodes.reasoning: Day 8 includes a Niagara Falls day trip described as an outdoor scenic nature activity with time to explore the falls and a Hornblower boat ride.
Day 6 includes the Toronto Islands ferry and bike ride explicitly labeled as an outdoor nature activity (beaches, gardens, bike riding, outdoor exploration).
Day 1 includes a Harbourfront stroll described as an outdoor, relaxing walk with lake views and fresh air — a low-effort way to get outside.
